# DevDigest — Copilot instructions

The single source of truth for this repo is `AGENTS.md` in the repo root.
Read it for stack, coding rules, workflow rules, and do-not-touch areas.

Before working in a package (`server/`, `client/`, `reviewer-core/`, `e2e/`), also read that package's `AGENTS.md` and `INSIGHTS.md`.

Follow those rules exactly.
